history.content:
<thought>
The agent is facing north (up) at position (row 6, col 3). The cell directly ahead is lava (L), so moving forward is impossible. The goal (G) is located two rows ahead and two columns to the right. Turning right to face east will allow movement into the safe empty cell to the east (row 6, col 4), which is a floor tile. This path avoids the lava and provides a route around the obstacles toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,4) facing north. The goal G is at (5,2). The cell directly in front (6,4) is floor, which is safe and moves us closer to the goal. There is no obstacle ahead. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead (north) is a floor cell ('.'). The goal is located two cells to the west and one cell north of the current position. Moving forward will bring the agent one step north, closer to the goal, without stepping on lava. After moving forward, the agent can then turn left to face west and proceed to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom center, facing north (up). The goal 'G' is two cells to the left. The cell directly in front is a wall '#', so cannot move forward. The left cell is floor '.', so turning left will allow movement towards the goal. I will turn left to face west.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is currently at the bottom center of the view, facing upward (north). Directly above the agent is a floor cell (row5, col3) and above that is the goal (row4, col3). The path is clear, so moving forward will bring the agent closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly in front of me (north). The cell is safe to move into. I will move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
